title: NASA Space Place: Comets
description: A NASA Space Place source card about comets, tails, orbits, ice, dust, and solar heating.
license: Public Domain / NASA Media Usage Guidelines

pages.text: NASA Space Place explains comets as icy bodies that can form glowing comas and tails when sunlight warms their surfaces.
Use this source for comparing comets, asteroids, meteors, and planets through structure, orbit, composition, and evidence.
NASA materials are generally public domain as U.S. government work, but some images, partner resources, and logos have separate usage rules. Check item-level rights.
